title: Corn Delight
body: # **Corn Delight** ![Banner](https://s2.loli.net/2022/02/19/ExdvskV1lZPIC78.png) ## 🌽 **Introduction** **Corn Delight** is an addon of **Farmer's Delight** that add corn and foods about corn. Like other crops, corn has it's own wild crop: wild corn. Get kernels, grow it and harvest maize. We even have cornbread, stuffing, corn tortilla and Taco! **Time for some corn now!** ## ❗ **Precautions** We are using **Mysterious Mountain Lib(Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/mmlib)** as a library, **DO NOT** forget. You don't have to check for library updates all the time, but we recommend you keep the library up to date. ## 🔍 **Features** > 1. Mod-compatible Corns. > 2. Two Blocks High Corn Crop. > 3. Delicious Foods about corn. > 4. Using **Mysterious Mountain Lib(Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/mmlib)** for better experience. > *and more……* ## 🔨 **Forge Only** Corn Delight is a **Forge** mod, and have **no Fabric version for now**. I'm not a Fabric user. So I'm sorry if you want Fabric, or make your own. ## 📷 **Screenshots**
